settingTabRecognition.description: Settings tab for hand sign recognition behavior

settingTutorialLabel.description: Setting row label for replaying the tutorial

resetConfirmMappingTitle.description: Title for confirming hand sign mapping reset

resetConfirmMappingBody.message:
Only the hand sign mapping for the current operation mode will return to defaults.
Other operation modes and two-hand signs will not change.
resetConfirmMappingBody.description: Body for confirming hand sign mapping reset

resetConfirmMetaMappingTitle.description: Title for confirming two-hand sign mapping reset

resetConfirmMetaMappingBody.message:
Only two-hand sign assignments will return to defaults.
Hand sign mappings and settings will not change.
resetConfirmMetaMappingBody.description: Body for confirming two-hand sign mapping reset

resetConfirmSettingsBody.message:
Operation, display, and recognition settings will return to defaults.
Operation mode, hand sign mappings, and two-hand signs will not change.

settingMirrorTitle.message: Flip camera image horizontally (for selfie cameras)

settingSkeletonTitle.message: Hide camera image and show only hand skeleton

settingWakeTitle.message: Hand sign to start operation. After detection, perform command signs within the timeout period

settingWakeTimeoutTitle.message: Time to accept command signs after wake

settingToggleLabel.description: Setting label for operation toggle gesture

settingToggleTitle.message: Use two-hand signs to toggle operation ON/OFF or switch operation mode

settingPreferredHandTitle.message: When both hands are detected, prioritize signs from the selected hand

settingHoldTimeLabel.description: Setting label for gesture hold time

settingHoldTimeTitle.message: How long a sign must be held to confirm. Shorter = faster response, longer = fewer mistakes

settingHoldScrollSpeedLabel.description: Setting label for Hold to Scroll speed

settingHoldScrollSpeedTitle.message: Adjust the maximum scroll amount for Hold to Scroll
settingHoldScrollSpeedTitle.description: Tooltip for Hold to Scroll speed setting

settingPointerMoveSpeedLabel.description: Setting label for pointer movement speed

settingPointerMoveSpeedTitle.message: Adjust the maximum movement amount for Pointer Control mode
settingPointerMoveSpeedTitle.description: Tooltip for pointer movement speed setting

settingRepeatIntervalTitle.message: Repeat interval for continuous actions like volume and seek

settingInferenceFpsTitle.message: Hand sign inference frequency. Lower values reduce load but slow response

settingIdleInferenceFpsLabel.description: Setting label for lowering inference FPS while idle

settingIdleInferenceFpsTitle.message: Lower inference to 5fps only while waiting for the wake sign. Turn this off if wake feels sluggish
settingIdleInferenceFpsTitle.description: Tooltip for idle inference FPS setting

settingInferenceResolutionTitle.message: Maximum width passed to hand sign inference. XREAL Eye keeps the camera at 1920x1080 and downsizes only the inference input

settingOkDebugLabel.description: Setting label for hand sign recognition diagnostics

metaGesturePeaceFist.description: Meta gesture display name: peace and fist

hintWakeWithTimeout.message: 🖐️ $1 to wake → sign to control ($2s, or returns to idle after 1 action)

setupDescription.message: NyandSign needs camera access to detect hand signs. Press the button below and select "Allow every time" to enable camera access.

setupSuccess.message: ✅ Camera permission granted! This tab will close automatically...

labelTargetTab.description: Label for the target tab row in the gesture section

targetTabActive.description: Shown when no specific tab is locked (follows active tab)

logTargetTabClosed.message: Target tab was closed — reverted to active tab
logTargetTabClosed.description: Log when the pinned target tab is closed

tutorialStep1Body.message: NyandSign detects hand signs via your camera and controls both media playback and browser actions. This tutorial walks through the two operation modes and the basic flow.

tutorialStep2Body.message: Choose a camera from the top and press "▶ Start Camera". Smart glasses cameras are auto-detected. This step advances automatically once the camera starts.

tutorialStep3Body.message:
Media Control mode handles video/audio playback, volume, and seeking. Browser Control mode handles scrolling, back/forward, tab switching, and zoom.
These buttons switch both the active mode and the hand sign mapping. In PiP, Media Control uses a green border and Browser Control uses a blue border.

tutorialStep4Body.message:
Show an Open Hand 🖐️ to activate controls. When this area turns the mode color, perform a command sign within 5 seconds.
You can also set Wake to "None" to always accept command signs. This step advances automatically on wake.

tutorialStep5Body.message:
This list shows the hand sign assignments for the selected mode.
Media Control assigns playback, volume, and seek actions. Browser Control assigns hold-to-scroll, back/forward, tab switching, and zoom actions.
"Hold to Scroll" means: keep the assigned sign held and move it up, down, left, or right to scroll in that direction.
The flow is "wake sign → command sign". You can customize assignments separately for each mode.

tutorialStep6Body.message:
The switch in the header is a safety switch: recognition keeps running, but action sending stops when it is OFF.
The two-hand sign "$1" is assigned to "$2". Two-hand signs can toggle operation ON/OFF or switch between Media and Browser modes.

tutorialStep6BodyNoToggle.message:
The switch in the header is a safety switch: recognition keeps running, but action sending stops when it is OFF.
Two-hand sign actions are currently unassigned. In the Two-Hand Signs section, you can assign operation ON/OFF or Media/Browser mode switching.
tutorialStep6BodyNoToggle.description: Tutorial step 6 body when two-hand actions are disabled

tutorialStep7Body.message: Use the side panel when you want access to settings and logs. If it gets in the way of fullscreen playback, press "📌 PiP" to switch to a small popup window that keeps hand sign control going.

tutorialBtnFinish.description: Tutorial: finish button on last step
